content:
Hi all, I'm working on migrating kconfirm (Rust) to use the upstream kconfig parser (C) so I need to add Rust bindings for this.

I'm pretty sure these do not belong in rust/kernel/ since the kconfig interpreter isn't actually part of the kernel, but rather host tooling.

My best guess is that these bindings belong in scripts/kconfig/ alongside the C code, am I on the right track?
